name: agent-guards
description: Runnable guard skills for long-lived AI agents — token budget audits, hallucination triage, and cross-surface open-loop tracking. Each skill returns an exit code you can enforce in CI.

interface.shortDescription: Token, hallucination, and open-loop guards for autonomous agents
interface.longDescription: Three production-tested guard skills for long-lived AI agents. context-budget audits an agent's per-turn context window like a cost center and fails CI when the always-loaded context grows. claim-audit separates grounded, hedged, and bare factual claims so you catch the unverified assertions most likely to be hallucinations. open-loops extracts unresolved commitments, deferrals, and open questions from a transcript so cron jobs and triggers don't lose thread context. Dependency-light Python, exit-code gates — not prompt wrappers.
defaultPrompt: Which claims in this answer are unsupported?
Find open loops in this conversation
